title: matricaria maxima
intro: Matricaria maxima, also known as large flowered chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Matricaria maxima are attributed to its high content of apigenin and other flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Matricaria maxima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Matricaria maxima is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in capsule or powder form, often used to treat various health conditions.
